Controls.description: Implement strong identity verification with MFA
Controls.rationale: Identity-related assumptions require robust authentication to prevent spoofing and unauthorized access.

Controls.description: Enforce least-privilege access controls across all components
Controls.rationale: Access control assumptions limit blast radius and prevent lateral movement.

Controls.description: Implement network segmentation and encryption in transit: Private_Subnet, Network_Segmentation, TLS_Termination, Rate_Limiting
Controls.rationale: Network assumptions require boundary protection to prevent data exposure and DoS.

Controls.description: Use infrastructure-as-code with automated configuration validation
Controls.rationale: Configuration assumptions prevent tampering through misconfiguration and drift.

Controls.description: Implement dependency verification and supply chain security
Controls.rationale: Dependency assumptions protect against supply chain attacks and third-party compromise.

Controls.description: Implement audit logging and process verification: Health_Checks, Availability_Monitoring, Unauthorized_Access_Detection
Controls.rationale: Process assumptions ensure accountability and non-repudiation of security-relevant actions.

Controls.description: Maintain accurate and version-controlled architecture documentation
Controls.rationale: Documentation assumptions ensure knowledge continuity and accurate threat modeling.

Controls.description: Establish security governance framework with regular reviews
Controls.rationale: Governance assumptions require oversight to maintain security posture over time.

Controls.description: [PHIDatabase] Implement database-specific encryption, access logging, and connection pooling safeguards
Controls.rationale: Database components require tailored controls for data integrity and confidentiality.

Controls.description: Implement encryption controls: KMS_Key_Management, TLS_1.3, AES256_At_Rest, Key_Rotation, Key_Deletion_Protection
Controls.rationale: Architecture defines encryption controls that must be verified.

Controls.description: Implement logging controls: Immutable_Audit_Log, PHI_Access_Logging, API_Request_Logging, Anomaly_Detection
Controls.rationale: Architecture defines logging controls that must be verified.

Controls.description: Implement backup controls: Encrypted_Backups, Cross_Region_Replication, Restore_Testing
Controls.rationale: Architecture defines backup controls that must be verified.

Controls.description: Implement third_party controls: Vendor_Risk_Assessment, Contractual_Security_Controls, De_identified_Access_Only
Controls.rationale: Architecture defines third_party controls that must be verified.

Controls.description: Implement authentication controls: MFA, Password_Policy, Session_Management, SSO_Integration, Breach_Detection
Controls.rationale: Architecture defines authentication controls that must be verified.

Controls.description: Implement authorization controls: RBAC, Object_Level_Access_Control, API_Gateway_Validation, Least_Privilege
Controls.rationale: Architecture defines authorization controls that must be verified.

Compliance: Compliance frameworks identified in architecture definition:
--- HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act) ---
Framework: HIPAA Security Rule — Administrative, Physical, and Technical Safeguards
- Encryption of PHI at rest and in transit (164.312(a)(2)(iv))
Framework: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria — Security, Availability, Processing Integrity, Confidentiality, Privacy
- A.9 Access control — identity and authorization
- A.12 Operations security — malware protection, backup, monitoring
- A.16 Incident management — reporting and response
- A.18 Compliance — regulatory and contractual obligations
Review gap analysis for detailed compliance mapping against these requirements.
Summary: ASF processed architecture "asftest.yaml" and found 48 assumptions (3 critical, 4 high, 9 medium, 32 low). Validation: 1 violation(s) found — expected ≥8 high findings, got 4. Criteria met: minimum assumptions met: 48 (≥25); minimum critical findings met: 3 (≥3); STRIDE category "Spoofing" present; STRIDE category "Tampering" present; STRIDE category "Repudiation" present; STRIDE category "Information Disclosure" present; STRIDE category "Denial of Service" present; STRIDE category "Elevation of Privilege" present.
